capabilities.name: Website and public evidence interface
capabilities.summary: Public website for company information, technical documentation, evidence records, status information, and bounded read-only observations.
limitations: The static public interface does not attest to protected systems, private infrastructure, or live block-card data.
nonClaims: It is not a self-service account, checkout, client-upload, or interactive AI interface.
capabilities.promotionGate: Release only through the declared static release validation and public artifact binding process.

capabilities.name: Public release evidence
capabilities.summary: Public audit route and release manifest boundary for listed static artifacts when generated for a release.
limitations: The manifest binds only listed static artifacts and validation scope.
nonClaims: It is not runtime attestation for live APIs, protected systems, or future releases.
capabilities.promotionGate: Generate a manifest from the exact release checkout and retain a passing public audit receipt.

capabilities.name: Evidence registry
capabilities.summary: Public point-in-time evidence registry with source, revision, hash, maturity, and limitation context.
limitations: Hash and link validation does not rerun or prove the source campaigns.
nonClaims: Publication is not universal certification, a guarantee, or proof of all future revisions.
capabilities.promotionGate: Publish only records with stated revision, scope, evidence source, maturity, and limitation.

capabilities.name: Toolchain registry
capabilities.summary: Public inventory of detected toolchain versions and evidence-producing labels for the inspected environment.
limitations: Version capture is not current-install, availability, security, or production proof.
nonClaims: The registry does not claim the newest possible version of every tool or a current security result.
capabilities.promotionGate: Capture exact versions, rerun the relevant evidence path, freeze new evidence, and reconcile public claims before relabelling a toolchain state.

capabilities.name: Local verifier foundation
capabilities.summary: Repository-local verification result fixtures and deterministic result-code boundary.
limitations: No live server-side verifier or public upload flow is claimed.
nonClaims: A fixture result cannot establish production runtime conformity or validate artifacts that were not supplied.
capabilities.promotionGate: Require an implemented verifier, usable public interface, documented inputs, evidence bundle, and limitations before broader availability.

capabilities.name: Chain 978 bounded observation
capabilities.summary: Bounded read-only Chain 978 observation adapter with public verification metadata and fail-closed states.
limitations: A signed bounded observation is not contract safety, bytecode identity, reserve state, finality, or deployment correctness.
nonClaims: The endpoint does not accept transactions, forward public RPC, or expose private mesh details.
capabilities.promotionGate: Require configured signed observation inputs, key metadata, durable continuity controls, and scoped operational evidence before any maturity increase.

capabilities.name: Chain N521 bounded observation
capabilities.summary: Public boundary for a future bounded Chain N521 observation, designed to report awaiting state when independent evidence is absent.
limitations: No liveness claim is made until an independent gateway and public verification key are configured.
nonClaims: A waiting or unavailable UI state is not a simulated live head or a claim of chain availability.
capabilities.promotionGate: Require independent signed observation evidence, public verification metadata, and an accepted bounded gateway configuration before availability changes.

capabilities.name: Security kernel specification
capabilities.summary: Public specification for security-kernel responsibilities, primitive maturity, and fail-closed conditions.
limitations: The specification is not itself a production engine or production-safety certificate.
nonClaims: It does not replace applications, models, tools, cloud infrastructure, or chains.
capabilities.promotionGate: Require an implemented scope-specific control, tests, evidence, and release decision before promoting a specification claim.

capabilities.name: Authority policy specification
capabilities.summary: Public policy-specification foundation for authority evaluation and fail-closed behavior.
limitations: Enforcement requires integration into a concrete runtime or workflow.
nonClaims: The public specification does not demonstrate a deployed policy engine.
capabilities.promotionGate: Require integrated enforcement, scoped tests, and evidence before a live-control maturity claim.

capabilities.name: Evidence bundle specification
capabilities.summary: Public specification for evidence-bundle structure and disclosure boundary.
limitations: The bundle signature flow is not finalized by the public specification alone.
nonClaims: The specification does not claim an externally certified evidence service.
capabilities.promotionGate: Require a published bundle implementation, repeatable verification path, and scoped evidence before availability promotion.

capabilities.name: Research registry
capabilities.summary: Public registry that keeps research claims, non-claims, evidence, maturity, and limitations adjacent.
limitations: Public pages expose records and hashes but do not replay all underlying binary fixtures in the browser.
nonClaims: Research records are not a production-capability or production-certification claim.
capabilities.promotionGate: Require the adjacent claim, non-claim, threat, test vector, implementation artifact, and evidence path before infrastructure promotion.

capabilities.name: Utility catalogue
capabilities.summary: Public catalogue of utility concepts with purpose, boundary, and maturity labels.
limitations: Catalogue entries have different maturity levels and may not expose a usable service interface.
nonClaims: A listed utility is not automatically installed, live, hosted, or production approved.
capabilities.promotionGate: Require a purpose, usable interface, boundary, evidence, and limitation before promoting an individual utility beyond source-only status.

capabilities.name: Local Trust Gate
capabilities.summary: Planned local integration concept with no implemented public interface or release evidence in the current repository.
limitations: No public implementation, CLI, SDK, API, hosted interface, or release artifact is recorded.
nonClaims: This register does not claim Local Trust Gate is available, tested, beta, or production ready.
No public implementation, CLI, SDK, API, hosted interface, or release artifact is available.
capabilities.promotionGate: Require a public implementation, usable interface, evidence record, limitations, and owner-approved release decision before any availability promotion.
